headline: Keysight Launches AI Inference Emulation Platform to Validate and Optimize AI Infrastructure
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 17, 2026--New platform validates and optimizes AI inference infrastructure at scale using real-world workload emulation; live demonstration at NVIDIA GTC.
